lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh nirbhau niravair akaal moorat ajoonee saibhan gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:
Raag Bihaagraa, Chau-Padhay, Fifth Mehl, Second House:
To associate with your arch enemies,
and I obtained celestial peace. ||1||Pause||
I have made the effort to shake them off. ||1||
Then, I repeated the Name of the Lord, Har, Har,
is to live with poisonous snakes;
Of the many emotional attachments,
False is the love
which suck the mortal into the whirlpool of reincarnation. ||2||
Eternal is the Company of the Holy,
All are travellers,
who have gathered under the world-tree,
and are bound by their many bonds. ||3||
where the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises are sung.
Nanak seeks this Sanctuary. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਨਹਿ ਕੋਊ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: har kee gat neh koaoo jaanai |
lines.english: No one knows the state of the Lord.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raag Bihaagraa, Ninth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਜਤੀ ਤਪੀ ਪਚਿ ਹਾਰੇ ਅਰੁ ਬਹੁ ਲੋਗ ਸਿਆਨੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jogee jatee tapee pach haare ar bahu log siaane |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Yogis, the celibates, the penitents, and all sorts of clever people have failed. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੀਤੇ ਭਰੇ ਭਰੇ ਸਖਨਾਵੈ ਯਹ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਬਿਵਹਾਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: reete bhare bhare sakhanaavai yeh taa ko bivahaare |1|
lines.english: He fills what is empty, and empties what is full - such are His ways. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਉ ਰੰਕ ਕਉ ਕਰਈ ਰਾਉ ਰੰਕ ਕਰਿ ਡਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: chhin meh raau rank kau karee raau rank kar ddaare |
lines.english: In an instant, He changes the beggar into a king, and the king into a beggar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਾ ਰੂਪੁ ਧਰੇ ਬਹੁ ਰੰਗੀ ਸਭ ਤੇ ਰਹੈ ਨਿਆਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanaa roop dhare bahu rangee sabh te rahai niaaraa |2|
lines.english: He assumes so many forms, and plays so many games, and yet, He remains detached from it all. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਆਪਿ ਪਸਾਰੀ ਆਪਹਿ ਦੇਖਨਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: apanee maaeaa aap pasaaree aapeh dekhanahaaraa |
lines.english: He Himself spread out the expanse of His Maya, and He Himself beholds it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਨਤ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਅਲਖ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਜਿਹ ਸਭ ਜਗੁ ਭਰਮਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: aganat apaar alakh niranjan jih sabh jag bharamaaeo |
lines.english: Incalculable, infinite, incomprehensible and immaculate is He, who has misled the entire world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਭਰਮ ਤਜਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਚਰਨਿ ਤਾਹਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਓ ॥੩॥੧॥੨॥
lines.translit: sagal bharam taj naanak praanee charan taeh chit laaeo |3|1|2|
lines.english: Cast off all your doubts; prays Nanak, O mortal, focus your consciousness on His Feet. ||3||1||2||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raag Bihaagraa, Chhant, Fourth Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਬੀਧਾ ਹਰਿ ਮਨੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਝਕੋਲੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: har ras beedhaa har man piaaraa man har ras naam jhakole raam |
lines.english: My mind is pierced through by the sublime essence of the Lord's Name. The Lord is dear to my mind. With the sublime essence of the Lord's Name, my mind is washed clean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਮੇਰੀ ਜਿੰਦੁੜੀਏ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਮੋਲੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam dhiaaeeai meree jindurree guramukh naam amole raam |
lines.english: Meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, O my soul; as Gurmukh, meditate on the invaluable Name of the Lord.
